description: Plugin-distributed hooks for corporate-development-ma. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this M&A deliverable against the §3 house opinions (thesis before model, owner+date on every synergy, triangulated valuation, source+date on every multiple, no MNPI). Set CORPORATE_DEVELOPMENT_MA_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
